attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.JOB_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.LEGISLATION_CODE, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.INTERNAL_NAME, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.DISPLAYED_NAME, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.ID_FLEX_NUM, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.MASTER_FLAG, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS,
(
select JOB_GROUP_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS
minus
select JOB_GROUP_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.JOB_GROUP_ID = STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.JOB_GROUP_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PER_JOB_GROUPS)
